name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial offers fixed-rate personal loans of $1,500–$30,000 at 11.99–35.99% APR, with over 100 years in business and same-day funding via SpeedFunds.
description_long:
OneMain Financial is one of the oldest consumer lending companies in the United States, with over 100 years of operating history. The company operates a branch-based lending model supplemented by online and phone applications, serving borrowers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans. Their Miami W Flagler St branch is one of many physical locations across the country where customers can meet face-to-face with loan specialists.

OneMain offers secured and unsecured personal loans ranging from $1,500 to $30,000 with repayment terms of 24 to 60 months. Interest rates are fixed and range from 11.99% to 35.99% APR. The company serves a wide array of borrowing needs including debt consolidation, medical expenses, emergency costs, auto purchase and refinance, home improvement, moving, weddings, vacations, and specialty vehicle loans (motorcycles, RVs, boats). Applicants can check for pre-qualification offers online without a hard credit pull.

What distinguishes OneMain from online-only lenders is its branch network and emphasis on in-person service. Loan specialists are available for one-on-one appointments, including after-hours options to accommodate working customers. The SpeedFunds program enables borrowers to receive funds in as little as one hour after loan closing via an eligible bank-issued debit card. All loans carry fixed rates, fixed monthly payments, and no prepayment penalties, which removes the risk of payment volatility over the loan term.

OneMain is a viable option for borrowers with fair or imperfect credit who value human assistance and want predictable payments, but prospective customers should note that the maximum APR of 35.99% is high — comparable to some credit cards. Borrowers with stronger credit profiles may find better rates elsewhere. The $30,000 loan cap also means it is not suited for large financing needs. That said, the long track record, transparent terms, and branch accessibility make it a legitimate choice for non-prime borrowers needing structured installment credit.
pros: Over 100 years in business — established, regulated lender with long track record
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments — no surprise payment changes over the loan term
No prepayment penalties — pay off early with no additional fees
SpeedFunds enables funding in as little as 1 hour after closing via debit card
Pre-qualification check available online with no credit score impact
Both secured and unsecured loan options ($1,500–$30,000)
In-branch specialists with after-hours appointments available
cons: Maximum APR of 35.99% is high — near credit card territory for less creditworthy borrowers
Minimum loan of $1,500 rules out very small borrowing needs
Maximum of $30,000 is lower than some competitors for larger financing needs
Branch-centric model may limit accessibility for borrowers in areas without nearby locations
Rate range is wide (11.99%–35.99%), meaning actual rate depends heavily on individual credit profile
best_for: Borrowers with fair or imperfect credit who need $1,500–$30,000
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance from a loan specialist
People consolidating high-interest debt into a single fixed monthly payment
Borrowers needing emergency funds quickly via same-day SpeedFunds disbursement
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best suited for borrowers with fair or below-average credit who need a mid-size installment loan ($1,500–$30,000) and value in-person service or same-day funding. The main caveat is cost — rates up to 35.99% APR mean borrowers with good credit should comparison-shop online lenders first, as they are likely to qualify for significantly lower rates elsewhere.
